description: Testing user login with valid/invalid credentials, account lockout, and secure session creation
test_strategies: Valid username + valid password → successful login and session created
Valid username + wrong password → error message, no session created
Non-existent user → generic error (avoid enumeration)
Account locked after N failed attempts → lockout message shown
Empty username or password fields → validation error before submission

description: Testing new user signup with field validation, duplicate detection, and confirmation flows
test_strategies: All required fields filled correctly → account created, confirmation sent
Duplicate email/username → error message indicating already exists
Missing required fields → field-level validation errors shown
Password does not meet complexity rules → descriptive error displayed
Successful registration → redirect to dashboard or confirmation page

description: Testing forgot password, reset link, and password change with old password verification
test_strategies: Valid registered email → reset link sent, link expires after defined time
Unknown email → no indication of whether email exists (security)
Used/expired reset link → access denied with expiry message
New password same as old → validation error
Change password with wrong current password → denied

description: Testing that users can only access features and data permitted by their assigned role
test_strategies: Admin user → can access all management features
Regular user → restricted pages return 403 or redirect
Privilege escalation attempt via URL manipulation → denied
Role change takes effect without requiring re-login (or with, as designed)
Feature visibility matches role: UI elements hidden for unauthorized roles

description: Testing session creation, persistence, expiry, and invalidation on logout
test_strategies: Idle beyond timeout → session expired, redirect to login
Logout → session invalidated, back button does not restore session
Concurrent sessions from different devices → as per policy (allowed or blocked)
Session token not exposed in URL
Remember-me functionality persists session across browser close for defined period

description: Testing field-level validation including required fields, formats, length limits, and data types
test_strategies: Submit with all fields empty → all required fields highlighted
Email field with invalid format → format validation error
Text field exceeding max length → truncated or rejected with message
Numeric field with alphabetic input → type validation error
SQL injection string in text field → sanitized, no DB error exposed

pattern: Boundary value testing for numeric and date inputs
description: Testing at minimum, maximum, just-below, and just-above boundary values for all ranges
test_strategies: Input at exact minimum value → accepted
Input at exact maximum value → accepted
Input one unit below minimum → rejected with appropriate message
Input one unit above maximum → rejected with appropriate message
Input at midpoint of valid range → accepted normally

description: Testing search functionality with valid, partial, empty, and special character queries
test_strategies: Search with exact match keyword → correct results returned
Search with partial keyword → partial matches returned
Search with no matching keyword → empty state with appropriate message
Empty search query → all results or prompt for input
Search with special characters → handled gracefully, no error

pattern: Create, Read, Update, Delete data operations
description: Testing full lifecycle of data records including persistence and cascading effects
test_strategies: Create new record with valid data → saved, appears in list
Read/view record → correct data displayed
Update record fields → changes persisted after page refresh
Delete record → removed from list, confirmation dialog shown
Delete record referenced by other data → cascading behavior handled correctly

description: Testing file upload with valid/invalid types, size limits, and processing feedback
test_strategies: Upload valid file type within size limit → accepted, processing begins
Upload unsupported file type → rejected with allowed types listed
Upload file exceeding size limit → rejected with size limit message
Upload empty/corrupt file → handled gracefully with error message
Multiple file uploads → all processed, progress shown per file

description: Testing real-time and scheduled notifications across channels (in-app, email, SMS)
test_strategies: Triggering event occurs → notification delivered within defined time
User with notifications disabled → no notification sent
Notification contains correct recipient, subject, and content
User can mark notification as read → status updates correctly
Bulk notifications → all recipients receive within SLA, no duplicates

description: Testing payment flows with valid/invalid cards, network failures, and refunds
test_strategies: Valid card + sufficient funds → payment processed, confirmation shown
Invalid card number → payment declined, user notified
Network timeout during payment → transaction not double-charged, retry option shown
Refund initiated → amount returned within defined period, record updated
Payment receipt/invoice generated with correct amount and details

description: Testing system behaviour under normal and peak load with response time assertions
test_strategies: Single user request → response within defined SLA (e.g. <2s)
Defined number of concurrent users → all requests served within SLA
Peak load simulation → no server errors, graceful degradation if overloaded
Sustained load over defined duration → no memory leak or performance degradation
Database queries under load → remain within acceptable execution time

description: Testing for common vulnerabilities: injection, XSS, CSRF, data exposure, and encryption
test_strategies: SQL injection in input fields → query not executed, input sanitized
XSS script in text field → script not rendered in browser
Sensitive data in API responses → passwords/tokens never exposed in plaintext
HTTPS enforced → HTTP requests redirected to HTTPS
Encrypted data at rest → verified via storage inspection or audit log

description: Testing report generation with correct data, filters, formats, and download
test_strategies: Generate report with default settings → file downloaded with correct data
Apply date/category filter → report reflects only filtered data
Export in different formats (PDF, Excel, CSV) → each format correct
Report with no data for selected period → empty state handled gracefully
Large dataset export → completes without timeout, all records included

description: Testing that dashboard metrics, charts, and KPIs reflect accurate and up-to-date data
test_strategies: Dashboard loads → all widgets display current data within defined freshness window
Underlying data changes → dashboard reflects change within defined interval
Date range filter applied → all charts update to show filtered period
Drill-down on chart element → detailed view shows correct subset
Dashboard with no data → empty state shown, no broken charts

description: Testing external API calls, authentication, error handling, and data mapping
test_strategies: Valid API credentials → integration authenticated, data fetched correctly
Invalid API key → graceful error, user-friendly message shown
External API timeout → retry logic applied, fallback behaviour triggered
API returns unexpected data format → mapping handles gracefully, no crash
Webhook received → processed correctly, stored, triggers expected action

description: Testing WebSocket, SSE, or polling-based real-time updates across clients
test_strategies: Event occurs → all subscribed clients receive update within defined latency
Client disconnects and reconnects → receives missed updates or current state
Multiple clients connected → update broadcast to all simultaneously
High frequency updates → UI updates smoothly without flickering or lag
No event for extended period → connection kept alive (heartbeat)

description: Testing time slot selection, conflict detection, reminders, and cancellation
test_strategies: Book available slot → confirmed, slot marked as taken
Book already-taken slot → conflict error, alternative slots suggested
Cancel booking → slot freed, cancellation confirmation sent
Booking reminder sent at configured time before appointment
Recurring schedule created → all instances appear correctly in calendar

pattern: System error handling and graceful degradation
description: Testing error states, user-friendly messages, and system recovery
test_strategies: Server error (500) → user-friendly error page, no stack trace exposed
Network failure during operation → progress not lost, retry option offered
Required external service down → graceful fallback, user informed
Timeout on long operation → timeout message with option to retry
Concurrent conflicting writes → one succeeds, other gets conflict resolution prompt

description: Testing bulk data export with format correctness, completeness, and access control
test_strategies: Export all data → file contains complete records, no truncation
Export with filter applied → only matching records in file
Unauthorized user attempts export → access denied
Export of large dataset → chunked or streamed, no memory error
Exported file opened in target application (Excel, etc.) → renders correctly

description: Testing data consistency when multiple users access or modify the same resource
test_strategies: Two users edit same record simultaneously → last-write-wins or conflict detected
Multiple users book same slot simultaneously → only one succeeds
Concurrent fund transfers → total balance consistent, no double spend
Bulk operation under concurrent access → atomic completion or rollback
Read during write operation → consistent snapshot returned

description: Testing keyboard navigation, screen reader support, and mobile responsiveness
test_strategies: All interactive elements reachable via keyboard tab navigation
Screen reader announces element labels and state changes correctly
UI renders correctly on mobile (320px), tablet (768px), desktop (1280px)
Touch targets meet minimum size requirements on mobile
Colour contrast ratio meets WCAG AA standard (4.5:1 for normal text)

description: Testing uptime guarantees, failover behaviour, and recovery time objectives
test_strategies: Primary server fails → failover to backup within defined RTO
System monitored continuously → downtime detected and alerted within SLA
Scheduled maintenance → users notified in advance, maintenance page shown
Recovery after crash → no data loss beyond defined RPO
Load balancer distributes traffic → no single point of failure under load

description: Testing that user actions and system events are logged with correct details for traceability
test_strategies: User performs action → log entry created with timestamp, user ID, action type
Failed login attempt → logged with IP address and timestamp
Data modification → before and after values captured in audit log
Log access restricted to admin roles only
Logs retained for defined compliance period, older entries archived
